description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in rich, dark brown leather with a deep button-tufted pattern across the backrest, arms, and seat. The sofa features three distinct seat sections, each with plush, attached cushions that blend seamlessly into the overall design. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest and creating a continuous, enveloping silhouette. The legs are short, blocky, and slightly recessed, finished in a dark wood tone that complements the leather upholstery. The surface of the leather is glossy, with visible creases and a luxurious sheen, while the tufting adds a textured, quilted effect. This sofa exudes a sense of sophistication and comfort, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield sofa with deep button-tufting, rolled arms, and three plush seat sections. The glossy, textured upholstery and classic design evoke luxury and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three seat sections, deep button-tufted backrest and arms, and the glossy leather finish.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled armrest, tufted detailing, and the sofa's depth and profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the smooth, uninterrupted leather surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and tufted details, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat cushions with deep button-tufting; backrest and arms are also fully tufted and continuous.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rolled and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with deep button-tufting and a classic Chesterfield profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs placed at the corners, finished in dark wood, slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a curved profile, fully button-tufted and matching the armrest height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a deep button-tufted, quilted texture throughout the backrest, arms, and seat.
